# Mark It Live — Markdown Live Previewer

> A free, privacy-first online Markdown editor with live preview. All data is processed locally in your browser — zero cloud uploads.

## Features

- Real-time split-pane Markdown preview with synchronized scrolling
- Mermaid diagram rendering (flowcharts, sequence, Gantt, class, state, ER diagrams)
- LaTeX math typesetting via MathJax (inline and block)
- Vega-Lite data visualization charts
- ABC notation music score rendering
- SMILES chemical structure drawing
- WikiLinks bidirectional linking and knowledge base management
- 12 curated preview themes (Academic, Developer, Classical, Aurora, Neon Rain, and more)
- External media privacy shield (auto-blocks external iframes/videos with allowlist)
- GitHub Alerts syntax support
- Page Break markers for precise PDF pagination
- Export to PDF, PNG, SVG, Markdown
- Built-in PDF merge tool
- Excel to Markdown table converter
- Word count tool (excludes code blocks and math formulas)
- Dark mode support
- Responsive design for all devices

## Usage

Open the app directly in any modern browser. No installation, registration, or login required.
All documents are stored in your browser's localStorage and IndexedDB.

## Pages

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy.html): How we handle your data (spoiler: we don't collect any)
- [Terms of Service](/terms.html): Usage terms for the application
- [About](/about.html): About the project and its author

## Optional

- [robots.txt](/robots.txt): Crawler instructions
- [sitemap.xml](/sitemap.xml): Site structure for search engines
- [opensearchdescription.xml](/opensearchdescription.xml): OpenSearch browser integration
